answer:
In *Traité de Législation Vol. I*, Charles Comte uses *méthode analytique* (analytical method) to refer to the empirical, observational approach he advocates for studying morality and legislation, modeled on the natural sciences.[^1] Rather than inventing systems, prescribing maxims, or relying on theological/sentimental methods, it consists of a clear, methodical description (*exposition*) of the **causes** (traced back to primitive facts in men or things), **nature** (e.g., provisions, force, and composing elements), and **effects** (good and bad consequences relative to human well-being) of any action, habit, institution, or law.[^2][^3] 

This method classifies facts rigorously—focusing on general/permanent ones with significant national impact—without advising conduct or imposing duties; its power lies in truth's natural tendency to promote useful causes and reject harmful ones once exposed.[^4] Chapter 2 is devoted to it entirely, arguing it drives moral/legal progress by replacing ignorance/error with factual knowledge (e.g., intemperance's pleasures vs. its long-term ruinous effects on body, mind, family, and society).[^5]

[^1]: Charles Comte, *Traité de Législation: VOL I*, ch. 2, [p-5219cf](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-i-7e62a2/02-de-la-methode-analytique-appliquee-a-l-etude-de-la/translation/#p-5219cf).

[^2]: Charles Comte, *Traité de Législation: VOL I*, ch. 2, [p-9c5de2](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-i-7e62a2/02-de-la-methode-analytique-appliquee-a-l-etude-de-la/translation/#p-9c5de2).

[^3]: Charles Comte, *Traité de Législation: VOL I*, ch. 2, [p-c1dbae](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-i-7e62a2/02-de-la-methode-analytique-appliquee-a-l-etude-de-la/translation/#p-c1dbae).

[^4]: Charles Comte, *Traité de Législation: VOL I*, ch. 2, [p-cf7d7b](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-i-7e62a2/02-de-la-methode-analytique-appliquee-a-l-etude-de-la/translation/#p-cf7d7b); ch. 1, [p-fa884d](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-i-7e62a2/01-chapitre-premier/translation/#p-fa884d).

[^5]: Charles Comte, *Traité de Législation: VOL I*, ch. 2, [full chapter](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-i-7e62a2/02-de-la-methode-analytique-appliquee-a-l-etude-de-la/translation/).
